title: UiPath Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
text: UiPath announced financial results for Q3 FY2026 ended October 31, 2025. Revenue & Growth: Q3 revenue $411 million (16% year-over-year increase), ARR $1.782 billion (11% year-over-year increase), Net new ARR $59 million. Profitability: GAAP gross margin 83%, Non-GAAP gross margin 85%, GAAP operating income $13 million, Non-GAAP operating income $88 million. Customer Metrics: Dollar-based net retention rate 107%, Net cash from operations $28 million, Non-GAAP adjusted free cash flow $28 million. Balance Sheet: Cash and equivalents $1.52 billion. CEO Daniel Dines stated: "Enterprises are accelerating their AI and automation strategies, and they're looking for a unified platform rather than standalone tools." Fourth Quarter Guidance (Fiscal 2026): Revenue $462-$467 million, ARR $1.844-$1.849 billion, Non-GAAP operating income ~$140 million.
